title: ByBit - Rekt
relevance_summary: Multisig signer tricked into approving a transaction that masked a malicious wallet implementation upgrade

prevention.rule: Block any tx that deploys a contract with a known malicious function signature

monitoring_rules: Block any tx deploying a contract with 'sweepERC20()'
summary: Hackers tricked ByBit multisig signers into approving a transaction that masked a malicious wallet implementation upgrade, allowing them to drain the wallet. A guard could have blocked the deployment of contracts containing the 'sweepERC20()' function.
